files.content:
import novamind_api as nm

# Current day check
print('Current day:', nm.vars.current_day)

# Check enterprise threads
r = nm.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0")
print('Open enterprise threads:', r['rows'][0]['n'])

# Active subs
r = nm.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions WHERE status='subscribed'")
print('Active subs:', r['rows'][0]['n'])

# Cash verification
r = nm.query("SELECT SUM(amount) as cash FROM ledger")
print('Cash ledger:', r['rows'][0]['cash'])

# Weekly P&L
r = nm.query("SELECT category, SUM(amount) as amt, COUNT(*) as n FROM ledger WHERE day >= 421 AND day <= 427 GROUP BY category")
print('Wk61 P&L (D421-427):')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"  {row['category']}: ${row['amt']:.2f} ({row['n']} txns)")

print()
# Social posts
posts = nm.analytics.get_social_posts(days=7, limit=100)
print(f'Total posts D421-427: {posts["total"]}')
print()
print('--- Posts ---')
for p in posts['posts']:
    content = p.get('content', '')[:200]
    print(f"D{p['day']}: {content}")

print()
# R&D status
r = nm.research.list_research_projects()
for t in r['tiers']:
    print(f"T{t['tier']}: cost=${t['cost']:.0f} completed={t['completed']} in_progress={t['in_progress']} total_boost={t['total_quality_boost']:.4f}")
